questions.text_zh: 在团队合作中，你通常扮演的角色是？
questions.text_en: In a team, what role do you usually play?

options.text_zh: 主动带领方向，协调分工
options.text_en: Lead the direction and coordinate tasks

options.text_zh: 配合团队，完成自己的部分
options.text_en: Cooperate and complete my part

options.text_zh: 默默做事，不主动发言
options.text_en: Work quietly without speaking up

questions.text_zh: 面对他人的批评，你的第一反应是？
questions.text_en: How do you react to criticism from others?

options.text_zh: 理性分析，有用的接受，无用的忽略
options.text_en: Analyze rationally, accept what's useful

options.text_zh: 有点不舒服，但会反思一下
options.text_en: A bit uncomfortable, but will reflect

options.text_zh: 很难接受，容易内耗
options.text_en: Hard to accept, tend to overthink

questions.text_zh: 你能清楚地知道自己想要什么吗？
questions.text_en: Do you clearly know what you want?

options.text_zh: 很清晰，有明确的目标和规划
options.text_en: Very clear, with specific goals and plans

options.text_zh: 大致知道，但偶尔迷茫
options.text_en: Generally know, but occasionally confused

options.text_zh: 不太确定，经常摇摆
options.text_en: Not sure, often摇摆

questions.text_zh: 当朋友问你对某件事的看法时，你会？
questions.text_en: When friends ask your opinion, you would?

options.text_zh: 直接表达自己的观点，不怕冲突
options.text_en: Express directly, not afraid of conflict

options.text_zh: 看情况，有时候会委婉一些
options.text_en: Depends, sometimes be tactful

options.text_zh: 尽量附和别人，避免表达真实想法
options.text_en: Try to agree, avoid expressing real thoughts

questions.text_zh: 你做事的出发点通常是？
questions.text_en: What's your starting point when doing things?

options.text_zh: 是否符合自己的原则和价值观
options.text_en: Whether it aligns with my principles

options.text_zh: 综合考虑利弊和他人感受
options.text_en: Consider pros/cons and others' feelings

options.text_zh: 主要看别人怎么做，跟着走
options.text_en: Follow what others do

questions.text_zh: 在亲密关系中，你的安全感主要来自？
questions.text_en: In close relationships, your sense of security comes from?

options.text_zh: 自己内心的稳定，不太依赖对方
options.text_en: Inner stability, not too dependent

options.text_zh: 双方的沟通和陪伴
options.text_en: Mutual communication and companionship

options.text_zh: 对方时刻的回应和确认
options.text_en: Constant responses and reassurance

questions.text_zh: 当朋友向你倾诉烦恼时，你会？
questions.text_en: When friends share their troubles, you?

options.text_zh: 耐心倾听，但不会过度卷入
options.text_en: Listen patiently, don't get too involved

options.text_zh: 认真共情，有时会被影响心情
options.text_en: Empathize deeply, sometimes affected

options.text_zh: 完全沉浸其中，比自己还着急
options.text_en: Fully immersed, more anxious than them

questions.text_zh: 你能接受朋友之间有不同的亲密程度吗？
questions.text_en: Can you accept different levels of closeness with friends?

options.text_zh: 很自然，每个人有不同距离
options.text_en: Natural, different distances for different people

options.text_zh: 能接受，但偶尔会有点失落
options.text_en: Can accept, but occasionally feel lost

options.text_zh: 很难接受，希望最好的朋友只对自己最好
options.text_en: Hard to accept, want best friend to only be best with me

questions.text_zh: 你在感情中的表现更接近？
questions.text_en: How do you behave in relationships?

options.text_zh: 独立自在，给彼此空间
options.text_en: Independent, give each other space

options.text_zh: 适度依赖，需要陪伴但不黏人
options.text_en: Moderate dependence, need company but not clingy

options.text_zh: 容易焦虑，总担心被抛弃
options.text_en: Easily anxious, worry about being abandoned

questions.text_zh: 你会为了维护关系而委屈自己吗？
questions.text_en: Would you委屈 yourself to maintain a relationship?

options.text_zh: 不会，关系需要双向奔赴
options.text_en: No, relationships need mutual effort

options.text_zh: 偶尔会，但不想变成习惯
options.text_en: Occasionally, but don't want it to become habit

options.text_zh: 经常，害怕失去这段关系
options.text_en: Often, afraid of losing the relationship

questions.text_zh: 你对世界的基本看法是？
questions.text_en: What's your basic view of the world?

options.text_zh: 总体上相信人性本善，世界在变好
options.text_en: Believe in human goodness, world is improving

options.text_zh: 有好有坏，看具体情况
options.text_en: Good and bad, depends on the situation

options.text_zh: 比较悲观，觉得人性自私
options.text_en: Rather pessimistic, human nature is selfish

questions.text_zh: 面对规则，你的态度是？
questions.text_en: What's your attitude towards rules?

options.text_zh: 规则是参考，关键看实际情况灵活处理
options.text_en: Rules are reference, handle flexibly

options.text_zh: 大部分时候遵守，偶尔变通
options.text_en: Follow most of the time, occasionally adapt

options.text_zh: 严格按规则来，不遵守就会不安
options.text_en: Strictly follow rules, uneasy if not

questions.text_zh: 你做事的目标感强吗？
questions.text_en: Do you have a strong sense of purpose?

options.text_zh: 很强，有清晰的中长期目标
options.text_en: Very strong, clear medium/long-term goals

options.text_zh: 有一些短期目标，长期的还在摸索
options.text_en: Some short-term goals, long-term still exploring

options.text_zh: 随性而为，走一步看一步
options.text_en: Go with the flow, take it step by step

questions.text_zh: 当计划被打乱时，你会？
questions.text_en: When plans are disrupted, you?

options.text_zh: 快速调整，重新制定方案
options.text_en: Quickly adjust and make a new plan

options.text_zh: 有点烦躁，但能慢慢适应
options.text_en: A bit frustrated, but can adapt slowly

options.text_zh: 很焦虑，不知道该怎么办
options.text_en: Very anxious, don't know what to do

questions.text_zh: 你做选择时更看重？
questions.text_en: When making choices, you value more?

options.text_zh: 这件事有没有意义、有没有价值
options.text_en: Whether it's meaningful and valuable

options.text_zh: 性价比和实际收益
options.text_en: Cost-effectiveness and actual returns

options.text_zh: 别人怎么看，会不会被认可
options.text_en: What others think, whether approved

questions.text_zh: 你做事的动力主要来自？
questions.text_en: Where does your motivation mainly come from?

options.text_zh: 内在兴趣和热情驱动
options.text_en: Inner interest and passion

options.text_zh: 外部奖励和目标驱动
options.text_en: External rewards and goals

options.text_zh: 别人的期待和压力驱动
options.text_en: Others' expectations and pressure

questions.text_zh: 面对重要决策，你的方式是？
questions.text_en: How do you handle important decisions?

options.text_zh: 快速分析利弊，果断拍板
options.text_en: Quick analysis, decisive

options.text_zh: 深思熟虑，综合多方意见
options.text_en: Think carefully, integrate opinions

options.text_zh: 犹豫不决，容易反复
options.text_en: Hesitant, easy to go back and forth

questions.text_zh: 想到一个好主意后，你会？
questions.text_en: After having a good idea, you?

options.text_zh: 马上动手，边做边调整
options.text_en: Start immediately, adjust as I go

options.text_zh: 先规划一下，再开始执行
options.text_en: Plan first, then execute

options.text_zh: 想想而已，真正行动的不多
options.text_en: Just think about it, rarely take action

questions.text_zh: 你更喜欢哪种工作状态？
questions.text_en: Which work style do you prefer?

options.text_zh: 高效冲刺，短时间集中产出
options.text_en: Efficient sprints, focused output

options.text_zh: 稳步前进，保持匀速
options.text_en: Steady progress, maintain pace

options.text_zh: 间歇性爆发，经常拖延
options.text_en: Intermittent bursts, often procrastinate

questions.text_zh: 你做决策时更依赖？
questions.text_en: When making decisions, you rely more on?

options.text_zh: 直觉 + 数据，两者结合
options.text_en: Intuition + data, both combined

options.text_zh: 理性分析，多方验证
options.text_en: Rational analysis, verify from multiple angles

options.text_zh: 别人的建议，怕自己判断错
options.text_en: Others' advice, afraid of wrong judgment

questions.text_zh: 在社交场合中，你通常是？
questions.text_en: At social events, you usually?

options.text_zh: 主动破冰，自然地和陌生人聊天
options.text_en: Initiate conversations, chat naturally with strangers

options.text_zh: 有人搭话就聊，不太主动
options.text_en: Chat when approached, not very proactive

options.text_zh: 躲在角落，希望没人注意到我
options.text_en: Hide in corner, hope no one notices me

questions.text_zh: 你和朋友之间的界限感如何？
questions.text_en: How are your boundaries with friends?

options.text_zh: 清晰明确，尊重彼此隐私
options.text_en: Clear and definite, respect each other's privacy

options.text_zh: 比较近，但不过度干涉
options.text_en: Relatively close, but don't over-interfere

options.text_zh: 很模糊，喜欢了解朋友的一切
options.text_en: Very blurry, like to know everything about friends

questions.text_zh: 你表达自我的方式是？
questions.text_en: How do you express yourself?

options.text_zh: 真实直接，不伪装自己
options.text_en: Authentic and direct, no disguise

options.text_zh: 看场合和对象适度调整
options.text_en: Adjust moderately based on context

options.text_zh: 经常隐藏真实想法，怕被评判
options.text_en: Often hide real thoughts, fear judgment

questions.text_zh: 你对社交的态度是？
questions.text_en: What's your attitude towards socializing?

options.text_zh: 享受社交，能从社交中获得能量
options.text_en: Enjoy socializing, gain energy from it

options.text_zh: 可以社交，但需要独处恢复
options.text_en: Can socialize, but need alone time to recover

options.text_zh: 能免则免，社交消耗太大
options.text_en: Avoid if possible, too draining

questions.text_zh: 你在社交媒体上的表现？
questions.text_en: How do you behave on social media?

options.text_zh: 和现实中差不多，比较真实
options.text_en: Similar to real life, quite authentic

options.text_zh: 经过一定包装，但不离谱
options.text_en: Some packaging, but not outrageous

options.text_zh: 精心经营人设，和本人有差距
options.text_en: Carefully curated persona, differs from real self

hidden_question.text_zh: 周末深夜独处时，你通常会？
hidden_question.text_en: What do you usually do alone on weekend late nights?

options.text_zh: 看书、学习、做自己的事
options.text_en: Read, study, do my own thing

options.text_zh: 刷手机、追剧、放松一下
options.text_en: Scroll phone, binge shows, relax

options.text_zh: 约朋友喝酒/聚会 🍺
options.text_en: Meet friends for drinks/party 🍺
